title: Immunhistochemistry (Stadelmann Lab - single antibody, AP)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"btn3a","text":"Staining of FFPE human brain tissue using alkaline phosphatase secondary antibodies.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Immunohistochemistry was performed on 2-3 µm thick paraffin sections.
Blocking in 10% normal goat serum in TBS for 10 min @ RT
Decant 10% NGS in TBS and move directly to the next step without washing
Incubation of primary antibodies over night with respective dilution in 10% NGS @RT in a humid chamber %s %s
heat antigen retrieval (1x citrate buffer 10 mM , pH 6) - 30 min steamer
formic acid (98%) (for Amyloid beta immunhistochemistry) - 1minute at RT
Slides were developed using FastBlue 30-60 min 49 mL TBS pH 7.5, 1 mL Naphtol AS Mix Phosphat, 50 µL Levamisol, 25 mg FastBlue -> Filtration
Incubation with secondary antibody coupled to alkaline phospohatase 1:100 at RT for 2h in a humid chamber %s %s
3% hydrogen peroxide in TBS 10 min @ RT
creator: Jonas Franz
